definition: The foundational scale primitive: the map from a scalar value to a length or a position on one shared, labeled axis in real units, plus an aggregate over a stack of scalars (stacked heights → a total). Sits below charts, layout, and animation the way d3-scale is a standalone package; Web Charts composes its marks on top. Includes reference marks (a datum/threshold tick or region) as a guide on the ruler — the semantic marking is WE's, the region-mask visual treatment is FUI's.
usage: Standardized by the Scale Ruler Intent (minted from #2533 Fork 1, with Fork 4 folded in). Native-first over <progress> (scalar→length) and CSS aspect-ratio (ratio→box).
